label: yes
cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out when Jennifer could have gone to the swimming pool. The key here is to look at all the times she was seen doing different activities and see when she was free. Also, the pool closes after 10pm, so she must have gone before that. First, Jennifer woke up at 5am. Then Richard saw her at the office from 5am to 8am. So from 5 to 8, she was at work. Then there's a gap until Samantha saw her at the library from 12pm to 1pm. So between 8am and 12pm, there's no mention of her being somewhere else. Then from 1pm to 2pm, she was at the bike shop with Betty. Then from 2pm to 9pm, Sarah saw her at the electronics store buying a phone. After that, Thomas saw her walking towards the Statue of Liberty from 9pm to 10pm. The pool closes at 10pm, so she would have had to go before that. So the possible times she was free are between 8am and 12pm, and also maybe between 10pm and whenever she went to bed. But since the pool is closed after 10pm, she would have had to go before 10pm. The options given are A) 8am to 12pm, B) 9pm to 10pm, C) 2pm to 9pm, D) 12pm to 1pm. Let me check the timeline again: 5am - 8am: at office 8am - 12pm: unknown (free time) 12pm - 1pm: library 1pm - 2pm: bike shop 2pm - 9pm: electronics store 9pm - 10pm: walking to Statue of Liberty After 10pm: pool closed So the only time she was free was between 8am and 12pm.
